title: The Goatman V4 Reborned
description: The New Goatman V4 is here.
body:
**_THE GOATMAN V4 REBORNED_**

In Oct,4 2024 A user Called ''Tamo'' Created An mod. The Goatman V4.

An Mid mod That got 1.6K Downloads,Thank you for that.

So i lost my curseforge account and now i created a new account. as you can see.
[I Created A  Modrinth Account As You Can See ._.]

So I decided to remake it again.

So The new Features are down below.

_**FEATURES:**_

New And Fixed Textures [Just That ._.]

**_CREDITS:_**

Flamc04 - The Creator Of The Original Mod

Play it and have fun :)

**_CurseForge Page:_**

[CurseForge Page.](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-goatman-v4-reborned)

**THIS PROJECT IS DISCONTINUED**

Go to the curseforge page and download the new file
the modrinth file have **_issues_**

issues:mob not spawning on surface,sounds not playing,and other problems
